headline: Local acknowledgement is visible, but the shell stays pending.
Authoritative confirmation lands and calm return becomes legal.
Accepted-for-processing is distinct from authoritative completion.
Projection visibility informs the shell, but it does not quiet the chain.
Conflicting evidence must hold the shell in diff-first review posture.
Tuple drift keeps the original chain recoverable in place.
Policy blocks must degrade in place instead of throwing detached failure.
Scope denial keeps the shell recoverable with the last safe anchor preserved.
The initial revision stays pending while later evidence catches up.
Later evidence supersedes pending state without creating a competing chain.
